Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to construct a logical skeleton process constraints for the scenario Provide a Python dictionary with keys equivalence always before always after never together activ freq directly follows

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We must consider constraints logically RO always first Receive Order occurs always first activity like start

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: some activity must happen before another RO always before CA receive before check availability CA always before RI RI before PI PI before QC QC before PO PO before GSL GSL before D D before IC IC before RP

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Actually payment after dispatch maybe but could be after customer pays later

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Also equivalence constraints maybe some activities have same number of occurrences For example Pick Items equals Quality Check Might be each pick leads to QC one to one similarly Pack Order equals Generate Shipping Label

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Activity occurrences each activity occurs either 0 or 1 times in a case per order Typically each order will have exactly one occurrence of each step unless something fails and loops We can set each to 0 or 1 allowed

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Never together maybe no two activities that cannot coexist Not applicable Could set no never together constraints empty set

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Always before means if first activity occurs then second should have been executed previously That is second before first So we may want to enforce that each activity has its predecessor executed before it So always before set could be CA RO meaning if CA occurs RO before it

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Always after If first occurs then second occurs after somewhere later So we can set RO CA and so on

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Directly follows store pairs first second where second directly follows first

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We can also add equivalence certain activities same occurrence counts
